scripts.deploy: wrangler deploy && node -e "const r=require('child_process');const cfg=JSON.parse(r.execSync('npx wrangler d1 execute swg-rule-override-db --remote --command \'SELECT key,value FROM config\' --json').toString());const rows=(cfg[0]||cfg).results||[];const get=(k,d)=>(rows.find(r=>r.key===k)||{value:d}).value;const body=JSON.stringify({revert_after_mins:get('revert_after_mins','5'),cron_interval_mins:get('cron_interval_mins','5')});r.execSync('curl -s -X POST https://override.davideslab.eu/admin/settings -H \'Content-Type: application/json\' -d \''+body+'\'');console.log('Cron re-registered with',body);"
